description: Rejoins separated area parts or polygon parts back together with animation. Takes one or more areapart/polygonpart references.
utility: Animate rejoining of decomposed parts back together

arguments.name: parts
arguments.description: One or more areapart or polygonpart references to rejoin

examples.expression:
s = sheetrect(at(2,2), view(10,10), 5, 5, fc(lightyellow), fo(0.2))
ag1 = area(s, range(0, 0.6), range(0, 0.6), size(3,3), fc(red), fo(0.15))
ag2 = area(s, range(0.6, 1), range(0, 0.6), size(2,3), fc(green), fo(0.15))
ag3 = area(s, range(0, 0.6), range(0.6, 1), size(3,2), fc(green), fo(0.15))
ag4 = area(s, range(0.6, 1), range(0.6, 1), size(2,2), fc(blue), fo(0.15))
ap1 = areapart(at(3.2,17.4), ag1, fc(red), fo(0.3))
ap2 = areapart(at(3.2,26.2), ag2, fc(green), fo(0.3))
ap3 = areapart(at(11,17.8), ag3, fc(green), fo(0.3))
ap4 = areapart(at(10.9,26.3), ag4, fc(blue), fo(0.3))
rejoin(ap1, ap2, ap3, ap4)
